description.value:
A clockwork mace with an extending spring mechanism that grants surprising reach and a powerful first strike with knockback.

TrainingPropertiesSpecial
BasicOne-Handed, Reach, Melee d8Clockwork, Knockback, Stagger, Trip

rmeData.masterPerk: The first time during an encounter you use Reach or Lunge with this weapon, your attack gains advantage. If this attack hits, it deals weapon damage and your enemy must make a saving throw with disadvantage against the Knockback property.
